prompt: show a heat-map calendar of caffeine intake for a remote worker over 30 days: hours on the y-axis (00-23), days on the x-axis, with cell color intensity ranging from mint (0 mg) to crimson (400 mg).
prompt_refined: Generate a heat-map calendar visualizing caffeine intake for a remote worker over a 30-day period. The horizontal x-axis displays the 30 days. The vertical y-axis, on the left, represents the 24 hours of a day, labeled from 00 to 23. Each cell in the grid should be colored based on caffeine intake, with a smooth gradient transitioning from mint green (0 mg) for no intake to crimson red (400 mg) for maximum intake.
objects: Labels for 30 days on the x-axis
Labels for 24 hours (00 to 23) on the y-axis
Cells colored with a smooth gradient
Color legend/scale (showing 0 mg and 400 mg values corresponding to colors)
